testcase.classname: educator not found throws
testcase.name: educator not found throws
testcase.failure:
Error: expect(received).rejects.toThrow(expected)
Expected substring: "EDUCATOR_NOT_FOUND" Received message: "this.usersRepo.findById is not a function"
18 | const limit = Math.min(50, Math.max(1, opts?.limit ?? 20)); 19 | > 20 | const educator = await this.usersRepo.findById(educatorId); | ^ 21 | if (!educator || educator.role !== 'EDUCATOR') throw new Error('EDUCATOR_NOT_FOUND'); 22 | 23 | const prefs = await this.prefsRepo.findByUserId(educatorId);
